scripts.dev: npm run build -w @codeatlas/analyzer && npm run dev -w @codeatlas/web -- --dotenv ../../.env
scripts.build: npm run build -w @codeatlas/analyzer && npm run build -w @codeatlas/mcp-server && npm run build -w @codeatlas/web
scripts.build:pages: npm run build -w @codeatlas/analyzer && npm run build -w @codeatlas/web -- --preset github_pages
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @codeatlas/analyzer && npm run build -w @codeatlas/analyzer && npm run typecheck -w @codeatlas/mcp-server && npm run typecheck -w @codeatlas/web
